016package org.consensusj.bitcoin.jsonrpc;
017
018import org.consensusj.bitcoin.json.pojo.ChainTip;
019import org.consensusj.jsonrpc.JsonRpcStatusException;
020
021import java.io.IOException;
022import java.util.List;
023import java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture;
024
025/**
026 * Interface for a Bitcoin JSON-RPC client that implements {@code getchaintips}.
027 * <p>
028 * (This is needed to provide reactive Bitcoin JSON-RPC interfaces because we can't
029 * subclass BitcoinClient itself (because it is concrete.) In the future we may want to create
030 * interfaces with more Bitcoin RPC methods, but for now this is all we need.)
031 */
032public interface ChainTipClient {
033    @Deprecated
034    List<ChainTip> getChainTips() throws JsonRpcStatusException, IOException;
035    CompletableFuture<List<ChainTip>> getChainTipsAsync();
036
037    // TODO: Consider using Flow.Publisher to provide some reactive publishers directly in BitcoinClient?
038    //Flow.Publisher<ChainTip> chainTipFlowPublisher();
039}
